user_query: I've been stuck in meetings most of the week. Which days have nature activities where I can actually get outside?

selected_nodes.reasoning: Day 6 includes 'Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride' described as an outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens and bike riding (explicit outdoor nature).
Day 8 includes 'Niagara Falls Day Trip' described as a full-day outdoor scenic adventure at the falls (explicit outdoor nature).
Day 1 includes 'Harbourfront Stroll' — an easy outdoor walk along the waterfront with fresh air (explicit outdoor activity).
